source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist-like English product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese headings, body text, labels, and tabular numerals.
layout: Minimal transition UI with exact 8px radii, cool neutral surfaces, thin thaw-brown rules, green focus rings, petal-rib textures, compact dashboard/data views, and restrained winter-thaw spacing.

prompts.label: Transparent Snowdrop motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Snowdrop transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a snowdrop bloom botanical cutout, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A single snowdrop bloom (Galanthus) with one white downward bell-shaped flower, three white outer petals, small green petal-tip markings, a slender green stem, two narrow blue-green leaves, and a tiny thaw-brown papery sheath at the base. Accurate winter woodland flower form, crisp botanical detail, opaque natural surfaces.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the bloom, stem, leaves, or base.
Lighting/mood: clean soft studio light, quiet winter woodland transition mood, minimal and exact.
Color palette: snow white petals, green tips, cool blue-green leaves, thaw-brown base; no saturated colors outside these.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no bouquet, no vase, no hand, no landscape, no snow pile, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no watermark, no text, no decorative background.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Snowdrop light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Snowdrop", derived from the visible transparent snowdrop bloom motif.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the snowdrop image: snow-white petals, precise green petal tips, cool winter blue-green leaves, thaw-brown woodland base, and cool winter neutrals. The board must visibly respect these motif-derived colors only.
Canvas: 3840x2160 wide 16:9 board, high-resolution source asset.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text; make token rows and UI labels clear in gallery previews.
Required visible sections: Morphous Snowdrop, motif story, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows, generated assets.
Typography: include English UI guidance with Geist-like product type and Japanese guidance with Noto Sans JP-like examples: 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, metric tiles, table rows, command palette/search, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, 8px radius tokens, borders, subtle shadows, texture swatches, icon buttons.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, minimal transition system, precise grid, quiet utilitarian product UI, 8px card radius, thin thaw-brown rules, snow-white surfaces, green focus states, cool neutral panels, restrained texture from petal ribs and woodland thaw.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors: Snow White #F8FAF4, Petal Vein #E6ECE2, Green Tip #5C8A3A, Leaf Green #2F6B45, Thaw Brown #8A6A48, Winter Neutral #B9C3BA, Deep Woodland #1F2A22, Frost Shadow #D3D9D1.
Text: short readable labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no beige-only theme, no oversized landing page hero, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Snowdrop".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Snowdrop dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Snowdrop light-mode design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent snowdrop bloom motif and the visible light-mode board as references. Preserve the motif-derived palette roles, component language, minimal transition mood, petal-rib texture, thaw-brown dividers, green focus states, spacing, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Canvas: 3840x2160 wide 16:9 board, high-resolution source asset.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text; make token rows and UI labels clear in gallery previews.
Required visible sections: Morphous Snowdrop, Dark Mode, motif story, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows, generated assets.
Typography: include English UI guidance with Geist-like product type and Japanese guidance with Noto Sans JP-like examples: 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, metric tiles, table rows, command palette/search, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, 8px radius tokens, borders, subtle shadows, texture swatches, icon buttons.
Visual details: deep woodland green-black background from the snowdrop base, snow-white foreground text, green-tip primary controls, cool leaf-green success states, thaw-brown borders and separators, frosted neutral panels, subtle petal-rib texture, minimal winter-thaw transition accents, crisp shadcn-style controls.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors: Deep Woodland #1F2A22, Snow White #F8FAF4, Frost Shadow #D3D9D1, Green Tip #6E9B43, Leaf Green #2F6B45, Thaw Brown #8A6A48, Winter Neutral #B9C3BA, Petal Vein #E6ECE2.
Text: short readable labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no pure-black flat background, no orange/brown-dominant theme, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Snowdrop", no illegible tiny text.
